name: Elamipretide
summary: Elamipretide is a cardiolipin-targeted mitochondrial peptide tracked for a healthy-aging pilot in older adults with lower function.
mechanism_summary: Targets mitochondrial inner-membrane cardiolipin biology to test safety, inflammation markers, mobility, cognition, and strength in older adults.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: SHAPE elamipretide healthy-aging pilot; SHAPE elamipretide healthy-aging pilot is recruiting.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
